description: Email with relative date ('this Friday') and no timezone — tests date resolution and UTC assumption
subject: Quick Intro Call — Infrastructure Engineer
raw_text:
Hi Kirill,

Hope you're well! I found your profile on LinkedIn and wanted to reach out about a Infrastructure Engineer opening at our company, LogiTech GmbH.

Would you be available for a quick 20-minute intro call this Friday at 11am? We can do it over Zoom.

If Friday doesn't work, let me know a slot that suits you.

Thanks,
Sophie Wagner
Talent Acquisition
LogiTech GmbH
sophie.wagner@logitech-gmbh.de

expected.note: TRICKY: 'this Friday' from email_date 2026-06-08 (Monday) = 2026-06-12. No TZ stated = assume UTC. Prompt must resolve relative dates.
